items.desc: A key-shaped blade that chooses its wielder. Also opens stubborn doors.
items.name: Kingdom Key

items.desc: Restores a moderate amount of health. Tastes faintly of stars.
items.name: Potion

items.desc: Restores special energy.
items.name: Ether

items.desc: Fully restores health and energy. Hoarded by adventurers forever.
items.name: Elixir

items.desc: Salty, but sweet. Best eaten on top of a clock tower.
items.name: Sea-Salt Ice Cream

items.desc: A pouch of munny. Exchange rates with gold are a shopkeeper's dream.
items.name: Munny Pouch

items.desc: A clear shard dropped by Heartless.
items.name: Lucid Shard

items.desc: Warm to the touch. Do not store near the ice cream.
items.name: Blaze Shard

items.desc: A shard of concentrated cold.
items.name: Frost Shard

items.desc: Crackles quietly at night.
items.name: Thunder Shard

items.desc: Glows softly. Popular as a night light.
items.name: Bright Shard

items.desc: A rare and famous metal.
items.name: Mythril

items.desc: A page torn from a very hungry storybook.
items.name: Torn Page

items.desc: A building block for ships that sail between worlds.
items.name: Gummi Block

items.desc: Share it with someone and your destinies intertwine. No refunds.
items.name: Paopu Fruit

items.desc: Makes you feel about twice as big as you are.
items.name: Super Mushroom

items.desc: Handle with oven mitts.
items.name: Fire Flower

items.desc: Refreshingly dangerous.
items.name: Ice Flower

items.desc: Brief invincibility and an overwhelming urge to run at things.
items.name: Starman

items.desc: A second chance in fungus form.
items.name: 1-Up Mushroom

items.desc: Sturdy, aerodynamic, previously occupied.
items.name: Koopa Shell

items.desc: Speckled and warm. Please do not sell to hungry customers.
items.name: Yoshi Egg

items.desc: Grants a dramatic yellow cape and improved hang time.
items.name: Cape Feather

items.desc: Ears and a tail included. Statue mode sold separately.
items.name: Tanooki Leaf

items.desc: Shakes the entire room. Handle gently.
items.name: POW Block

items.desc: It goes 'bling' when you collect it. Endlessly satisfying.
items.name: Gold Coin

items.desc: Worth more, and it knows it.
items.name: Red Coin

items.desc: It is alive and it is ticking. Store away from the POW blocks.
items.name: Bob-omb

items.desc: Summons a very punctual tornado.
items.name: Warp Whistle

items.desc: Property of a frequently kidnapped monarch.
items.name: Royal Crown

items.desc: For carpentry, chiefly. Chiefly.
items.name: Sturdy Hammer

items.desc: Less a sword, more a wall with ambitions.
items.name: Buster Sword

items.desc: Light, sharp, dependable.
items.name: Mythril Sword

items.desc: A soft feather that argues with death and usually wins.
items.name: Phoenix Down

items.desc: The classic blue bottle.
items.name: FF Potion

items.desc: Like a potion, but taller.
items.name: Hi-Potion

items.desc: Restores magical energy and smells of static.
items.name: FF Ether

items.desc: Everyone owns one. No one has ever used one.
items.name: FF Elixir

items.desc: Crystallized knowledge of the planet. Slightly slippery.
items.name: Materia

items.desc: Warm yellow. Smells faintly of greens. Kweh.
items.name: Chocobo Feather

items.desc: Sets itself up at save points. Union rules.
items.name: Tent

items.desc: Cures everything except heartbreak and poor sales.
items.name: Remedy

items.desc: Liquid confidence.
items.name: Hero Drink

items.desc: Legendary armament of a legendary thief's wishlist.
items.name: Genji Glove

items.desc: Deceptively adorable. Blocks nearly every misfortune known.
items.name: Ribbon

items.desc: A fragment of the Crystal Ruins. Hums in four-part harmony.
items.name: Crystal Shard

items.desc: The blade of evil's bane. Sells itself, refuses to be sold.
items.name: Master Sword

items.desc: Fireproof, arrow-proof, chicken-proof.
items.name: Hylian Shield

items.desc: Extremely flammable. Sold as-is.
items.name: Wooden Shield

items.desc: Always comes back. Unlike some customers.
items.name: Boomerang

items.desc: Grappling hook, spring-loaded, satisfaction guaranteed.
items.name: Hookshot

items.desc: A bag of bombs. The bag is the safe part.
items.name: Bomb Bag

items.desc: Contains one (1) very patient fairy.
items.name: Fairy Bottle

items.desc: A crystallized extra helping of life itself.
items.name: Heart Container

items.desc: Tastes green.
items.name: Green Potion

items.desc: The expensive one.
items.name: Blue Potion

items.desc: A classic. Pairs well with pot-smashing.
items.name: Red Potion

items.desc: Blinding flash on impact. Not a snack.
items.name: Deku Nut

items.desc: Currency of Hyrule, found primarily in tall grass.
items.name: Rupee

items.desc: Opens exactly one door, somewhere.
items.name: Small Key

items.desc: A sliver of divine power. Glows smugly.
items.name: Triforce Fragment

items.desc: Sturdy lumber from the Lost Woods. Occasionally mutters.
items.name: Deku Wood

items.desc: Standard issue. Buy in bulk.
items.name: Kunai

items.desc: Pointy in every direction.
items.name: Shuriken

items.desc: Paper that goes boom. Keep away from the ramen steam.
items.name: Explosive Tag

items.desc: Tastes terrible, works great.
items.name: Soldier Pill

items.desc: Concentrated energy in candy form.
items.name: Chakra Pill

items.desc: Covered in techniques you are not supposed to read.
items.name: Ninja Scroll

items.desc: Sign in blood. Standard contract stuff.
items.name: Summoning Scroll

items.desc: Village affiliation sold separately.
items.name: Forehead Protector

items.desc: Do not make eye contact with the merchandise.
items.name: Sharingan Fragment

items.desc: Solidified spiritual energy, faintly warm.
items.name: Chakra Crystal

items.desc: Miso, extra chashu. The house specialty of a certain stand.
items.name: Ramen Bowl

items.desc: All-you-can-eat. Financially ruinous for the issuer.
items.name: Ichiraku Meal Ticket

items.desc: Heavier than they look. That is the point.
items.name: Training Weights

items.desc: For dramatic exits and awkward conversations.
items.name: Smoke Bomb

items.desc: Proof of an encounter with one of the three legends.
items.name: Legendary Sannin Token

items.desc: One of seven. Collect the set, get one wish. Collector demand is absurd.
items.name: Dragon Ball

items.desc: Full recovery in one bite. Chew thoroughly.
items.name: Senzu Bean

items.desc: Click, poof: anything from a bike to a house. Patent fiercely defended.
items.name: Capsule

items.desc: Beeps near treasure. Warranty void near wishes.
items.name: Dragon Radar

items.desc: Displays power levels. Prone to shattering at dramatic moments.
items.name: Scouter

items.desc: Bright orange. Zero stealth value, infinite style.
items.name: Turtle School Gi

items.desc: Stretches with any transformation. Shoulder pads optional.
items.name: Saiyan Armor

items.desc: Extends. A lot.
items.name: Power Pole

items.desc: Take it off mid-fight for dramatic effect.
items.name: Weighted Clothing

items.desc: Redeemable for one cloud ride. Pure of heart only.
items.name: Flying Nimbus Token

items.desc: From the very top of the tower. Mostly placebo. Mostly.
items.name: Sacred Water

items.desc: Serves one Saiyan or forty regular people.
items.name: Dino Tail

items.desc: Stores ki. Occasionally shouts.
items.name: Energy Crystal

items.desc: Up to 100x gravity. Floor reinforcement not included.
items.name: Gravity Module

items.desc: A full house in your pocket. Real estate agents despise this.
items.name: Capsule House

items.desc: Gotta sell 'em all.
items.name: Poké Ball

items.desc: Like a Poké Ball, but great.
items.name: Great Ball

items.desc: Premium capture technology in a tasteful black and yellow.
items.name: Ultra Ball

items.desc: Never fails. Never duplicated. Never cheap.
items.name: Master Ball

items.desc: A convenient spray-type medicine.
items.name: Pokémon Potion

items.desc: Fixes everything. The champion's favorite stall tactic.
items.name: Full Restore

items.desc: Instant experience. Nutritionists remain baffled.
items.name: Rare Candy

items.desc: One-way trip to the entrance. Rope not reusable, physics unclear.
items.name: Escape Rope

items.desc: The only affordable way to obtain a million-credit bicycle.
items.name: Bicycle Voucher

items.desc: An encyclopedia that judges you for incomplete entries.
items.name: Pokédex

items.desc: Fell from the moon, allegedly.
items.name: Moon Stone

items.desc: Warm forever. Great for cold shelves.
items.name: Fire Stone

items.desc: Do not stack near the Magnemite display.
items.name: Thunder Stone

items.desc: Perpetually damp in a pleasant way.
items.name: Water Stone

items.desc: A warm egg that makes everything around it slightly luckier.
items.name: Lucky Egg

items.desc: Sometimes, against all odds, you hang on.
items.name: Focus Band

items.desc: Squeeze rocks into juice.
items.name: Power Wrist

items.desc: A tiny bell blessed by a great fairy.
items.name: Fairy Charm

items.desc: A star-shaped charm carved from paopu wood.
items.name: Paopu Charm

items.desc: Attach to a Keyblade to change its destiny. Or to keys.
items.name: Keychain

items.desc: A fragment of the World Bridge, humming with Traverse Town's lamplight.
items.name: World Shard: Traverse

items.desc: A fragment of the World Bridge. Smells like fresh grass and coins.
items.name: World Shard: Mushroom

items.desc: A fragment of the World Bridge, refracting a hundred sunsets.
items.name: World Shard: Crystal

items.desc: A fragment of the World Bridge. Birds nest near it instinctively.
items.name: World Shard: Hyrule

items.desc: A fragment of the World Bridge, wrapped in someone's old headband cloth.
items.name: World Shard: Leaf

items.desc: A fragment of the World Bridge. Faintly warm, like a distant sunrise.
items.name: World Shard: Lookout

items.desc: The last fragment of the World Bridge. It buzzes: pika, pika.
items.name: World Shard: Viridian

items.desc: A Fire Flower's spirit sealed in a Blaze Shard. Warm handshake included.
items.name: Flame Charm

items.desc: A Senzu Bean dissolved in Full Restore. Medically alarming, extremely effective.
items.name: Perfect Recovery

items.desc: Materia infused with chakra. Glows in two colors and argues with itself.
items.name: Energy Materia

items.desc: A fairy wearing a tiny phoenix-feather cloak. She insists it's fashion.
items.name: Revival Fairy

items.desc: A Thunder Stone core wrapped in Thunder Shard filigree. Hair-raising.
items.name: Storm Pendant

items.desc: Mushroom-glazed soldier pill skewers. The mushroom makes it a meal.
items.name: Hero's Meal

items.desc: Capsule Corp engineering meets Silph Co design. Both legal teams are furious.
items.name: Pocket Capsule

items.desc: A Keyblade humming with a Triforce fragment. Opens hearts AND treasure chests.
items.name: Courage Keyblade

items.desc: Power Pole grain fused with Deku heartwood. Extends AND mutters.
items.name: Ancient Staff

items.desc: Ramen topped with sea-salt ice cream. Reviews are split exactly 50/50.
items.name: Questionable Combo Meal

items.desc: A Starman lashed to a sturdy hammer. Technically a wand. Legally a hammer.
items.name: Star Rod Replica

items.desc: A ninja substitution log dressed as a Pokémon doll. Takes one hit for you, judges you after.
items.name: Substitute Plush
